# freeipa_vault_owner (Resource)

Manages owners of a FreeIPA vault. This resource does **not** create the vault itself; it only adds or removes owners.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the vault to which owners are attached.

### Optional

- `owner_groups` (Set of String) Set of group names that are owners of the vault.
- `owner_services` (Set of String) Set of service principals that are owners of the vault.
- `owner_users` (Set of String) Set of usernames that are owners of the vault.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Internal identifier (vault name).
